title: SanDisk SSD PLUS 1TB Internal SSD - SATA III 6 Gb/s

Boosts burst write performance, making it ideal for typical PC workloads. The perfect balance of performance and reliability. Read/write speeds of up to 535MB/s and 450MB/s.

title: Silicon Power 256GB SSD 3D NAND A55 SLC Cache Performance Boost SATA III 2.5

Supports TRIM command, Garbage Collection technology, RAID, and ECC (Error Checking & Correction) to provide optimized performance and enhanced reliability.

title: BIYLACLESEN Women's 3-in-1 Snowboard Jacket Winter Coats

Humanized Design: Adjustable and detachable hood and adjustable cuffs to prevent wind and water for a comfortable fit. 3-in-1 detachable design provides more convenience; you can separate the coat and inner as needed, or wear them together. It is suitable for different seasons and helps you adapt to different climates.
